title: Village Siege Disabler
description: Disables the vanilla zombie siege mechanic
body:
Vanilla Minecraft has a very annoying mechanic called "Zombie Sieges" (not to be confused with Raids.)

If a player is in a village at midnight, there is a 10% chance that the game will spawn ~20 Zombies near the village, regardless of light level.

This mod simply cancels all siege events before they can spawn anything.
